name: redgifs-downloader
description: Firefox extension that adds HD/SD download buttons on RedGifs videos.

scripts.build: web-ext build --source-dir=. --artifacts-dir=dist --overwrite-dest --ignore-files=dist node_modules package.json package-lock.json recon.js .gitignore CHANGELOG.md README.md LICENSE updates.json
scripts.sign: web-ext sign --source-dir=. --artifacts-dir=dist --channel=unlisted --ignore-files=dist node_modules package.json package-lock.json recon.js .gitignore CHANGELOG.md README.md LICENSE updates.json
scripts.run: web-ext run --source-dir=. --ignore-files=dist node_modules package.json package-lock.json recon.js
